ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT ON OCT-07-2014 CONTINUED TO DEC-17-2014 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 AT THE REQUEST OF THE PARTIES FOR FURTHER ORDER OF EXAMINATION. ATTORNEY MELVIN YEE APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. JUDGMENT DEBTOR JEFF DRAEGER PRESENT TODAY. ATTORNEY MELVIN YEE TO NOTICE PARTIES OF NEXT DATE. JUDGE: HARRY M. DORFMAN. CLERK; S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (514)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAREZ, JOSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DRAEGER CONSTRUCTION, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $39,181.98 PRINCIPAL, $106.32 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $39,738.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
